article_title: Bylaw 14775 — Dominion Film Corporation Limited Bonus Bylaw 1917, Repeal Bylaw 2025
body:
Bylaw No. 14775 
Page 1 
CITY OF BURNABY 
BYLAW NO. 14775 
A BYLAW to repeal 
Dominion Film Corporation 
Limited Bonus By-Law 1917 
The Council of the City of Burnaby ENACTS as follows: 
1.
This Bylaw may be cited as DOMINION FILM CORPORATION LIMITED
BONUS BY-LAW 1917, REPEAL BYLAW 2025.
2.
Bylaw No. 223, being Dominion Film Corporation Limited Bonus By-Law 1917,
and all subsequent amendments are hereby repealed.
Read a first time this 28th day of October, 2025 
Read a second time this 28th day of October, 2025 
Read a third time 28th day of October, 2025 
Reconsidered and adopted this 15th day of November, 2025 
MAYOR 
 DEPUTY CORPORATE OFFICER 
Signed original bylaw on file.

minutes_briefs.title: Burnaby repeals 1917 Dominion Film Corporation bonus bylaw
minutes_briefs.summary: The City of Burnaby has repealed Bylaw No. 223, the Dominion Film Corporation Limited Bonus By-Law 1917, along with all its amendments. This old bylaw is no longer in effect as of November 15, 2025.
